description.text: A real treat of an arena with plenty of opportunities to play tricks on your opponents. One Base.

es.original: A real treat of an arena with plenty of opportunities to play tricks on your opponents. One Base.
es.translation:
Un escenario lleno de maldades para engañar al enemigo.
Un núcleo.

fr.original: A real treat of an arena with plenty of opportunities to play tricks on your opponents. One Base.
fr.translation: Une arène pleine de malice, parfaite pour jouer des tours à vos adversaires. Une base.

de.original: A real treat of an arena with plenty of opportunities to play tricks on your opponents. One Base.
de.translation: Eine süße Arena, die es euch ermöglicht, euren Gegnern Saures zu geben. Eine Basis.

ru.original: A real treat of an arena with plenty of opportunities to play tricks on your opponents. One Base.
ru.translation: Эта арена — настоящий подарок для любителей бить врага не силой, а хитростью. Одна база.

pt.original: A real treat of an arena with plenty of opportunities to play tricks on your opponents. One Base.
pt.translation: Uma gostosura de arena com um monte de oportunidades para fazer travessuras com seus oponentes. Uma Base.
